name: Ithil-Berylswift
personality: Equal parts spinning-propeller-topped and formidable, this rabbit's bead-like eyes ensure it has never rage-quit a failing test suite. Its coat shimmers with the quality of code it has never written carelessly. Downside: Ithil-Berylswift logs nothing, infers everything, fixes less. Upside: thumps one foot impatiently during slow CI pipelines.
